pulse_items.title: Artemis II Crew Returns Safely to Earth
pulse_items.summary: NASA's Artemis II mission successfully concluded with splashdown in the Pacific Ocean. The four astronauts are being recovered as viral images show their emotional reunion with families. This marks humanity's return to lunar orbit after decades.

pulse_items.title: Pragmata Pre-Load Crashes Servers
pulse_items.summary: Capcom's highly anticipated sci-fi game Pragmata opened pre-loads today, causing massive server overloads. Reddit threads are exploding with memes about error codes and speculation about the mysterious game's story.

pulse_items.title: Microsoft Unveils Agentic AI Platform
pulse_items.summary: At Azure Summit, Microsoft announced 'Project CogniAgent' - autonomous AI agents that can execute complex business workflows. The demo showed AI negotiating contracts and managing supply chains without human intervention.

pulse_items.title: 'Quantum Kitchen' Cooking Trend Explodes
pulse_items.summary: TikTok creators are using molecular gastronomy techniques at home, creating edible spheres and foams. The #QuantumKitchen hashtag has 2.3M views with high save ratios as people attempt liquid nitrogen desserts.

pulse_items.title: AI-Generated 'Lost Beatles Album' Goes Viral
pulse_items.summary: An anonymous creator used AI to generate a complete 'lost' Beatles album from 1974. The 45-minute album 'Northern Lights' is trending on Spotify with debates about AI creativity vs. artistic integrity.

pulse_items.title: Meme: 'My Brain During Meetings'
pulse_items.summary: A simple animation showing a hamster running in a wheel while corporate jargon plays is being DM-shared across workplaces. The meme perfectly captures post-pandemic meeting fatigue with 500K+ shares in 24 hours.

pulse_items.title: Major Earthquake Hits Tokyo Region
pulse_items.summary: A 6.8 magnitude earthquake struck near Tokyo, causing building damage and transportation disruptions. Early reports indicate limited casualties but significant infrastructure impact. Rescue operations are underway.

pulse_items.title: NBA Playoffs Controversial Call Goes Viral
pulse_items.summary: A last-second foul call in Lakers vs. Warriors Game 1 has sparked massive debate. Slow-motion replays show minimal contact, leading to #RiggedNBA trending with 200K+ tweets in 2 hours.

pulse_items.title: Discord Communities Obsessed with 'Analog AR'
pulse_items.summary: Niche tech communities are experimenting with augmented reality using only physical objects and smartphones. The movement rejects digital overlays in favor of creative real-world interactions documented through video.

pulse_items.title: Netflix's 'Chrono Detectives' Breaks Records
pulse_items.summary: The time-travel mystery series became Netflix's most-watched debut of 2026 with 82M hours viewed in first 3 days. Fans are creating elaborate timeline charts and theory videos on YouTube.

pulse_items.title: Search Spike: 'How to Spot Deepfake News'
pulse_items.summary: Google Trends shows 450% increase in searches about detecting AI-generated news videos. Concerns rise after several convincing political deepfakes circulated this week, prompting media literacy discussions.

pulse_items.title: Facebook Groups Debate 'Digital Sabbath' Movement
pulse_items.summary: Thousands of community groups are organizing weekly 24-hour digital detoxes. The movement gained traction after a viral post about mental health benefits, with local chapters forming globally.

pulse_items.title: Crypto Community Divided Over New 'Proof-of-Time'
pulse_items.summary: A novel consensus mechanism that uses verifiable delay functions instead of energy-intensive mining is splitting crypto communities. Proponents claim it solves scalability while critics question security.

pulse_items.title: Viral Thread: 'Office Plants That Survive Neglect'
pulse_items.summary: A Threads user's detailed guide to low-maintenance office plants has gone viral with 50K+ shares. The post combines practical advice with humorous anecdotes about coworkers who killed previous plants.

pulse_items.title: Climate Protesters Use Biodegradable Glitter
pulse_items.summary: Environmental activists staged creative protests using plant-based, biodegradable glitter that dissolves in rain. The visually striking demonstrations are trending as both art and effective activism.
